/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/finsight_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/main_gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/auth/LoginDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/auth/RegisterDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/dashboard/DashboardWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/profile/ProfileWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/transactions/TransactionsWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/transactions/TransactionDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/budgets/BudgetsWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_gui.dir/src/gui/ai/AIInsightsWindow.cpp.o -o finsight_gui  libfinsight_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
